title: Cencora Investor Relations Overview

note: Summarizes Cencora's 2025 Form 10-K business description, operating income movement, scale, and international exposure.

note: Market-data source for market capitalization, P/E ratio, revenue TTM, EPS, and share data near the registry refresh date.

title: World Courier and ICS Become First End-to-End Specialty Logistics Provider for Advanced Therapies
note: Describes Cencora specialty logistics capabilities for clinical trials, commercialization, cryogenic support, and advanced therapies.

title: World Courier About Us
note: Confirms World Courier is part of Cencora and describes its specialty logistics network and healthcare logistics focus.

title: OpenLMIS Product
note: Open-source health commodity logistics software source used as a plausible decentralized inventory and replenishment alternative.

title: OpenBoxes Open-Source Inventory Management
note: Open-source healthcare and disaster-relief inventory management system used as a plausible facility-level alternative.

title: OpenBoxes GitHub Repository
note: Public repository for the OpenBoxes supply-chain management system.

title: EPCIS and CBV
note: Core standard source for interoperable supply-chain visibility and event data across trading partners.

title: EPCIS Standard 2.0.1
note: Reference specification for EPCIS event data and interfaces.

title: Standards and Sensors for Visibility in the Pharmaceutical Cold Chain
note: Cold-chain standards source supporting the specialty-logistics disruption concept around sensor and EPCIS visibility.
